info.name: AWS Control Tower API
info.description:
AWS Control Tower provides the easiest way to set up and govern a secure, multi-account AWS environment. The API enables programmatic management of landing zones, controls (guardrails), baselines, and organizational unit registrations within your AWS Control Tower environment.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services

item.name: AWS Control Tower Create Landing Zone

request.description: Creates a new landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Delete Landing Zone

request.description: Decommissions a landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone

request.description: Returns details about a landing zone. Includes status and version.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zones

request.description: Returns a list of landing zones in the caller's AWS account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Landing Zone

request.description: Updates an existing landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Landing Zone

request.description: Re-enables a landing zone after it has been decommissioned, or extends it to new regions. This is an asynchronous operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone Operation

request.description: Returns the status of a specified landing zone operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zone Operations

request.description: Lists all landing zone operations from the past 90 days.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Activates a control, otherwise known as a guardrail, upon the specified organizational unit (OU). This operation is asynchronous and returns a control operation identifier that can be used to check the status.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Deactivates a control by removing it from the specified organizational unit (OU). This operation is asynchronous and returns an operation identifier that can be used to check the status.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Control

request.description: Retrieves details about an enabled control. For usage examples, see the AWS Control Tower controls reference guide.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Controls

request.description: Lists the controls enabled by AWS Control Tower on the specified organizational unit and the accounts it contains. For usage examples, see the AWS Control Tower controls reference guide.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Control

request.description: Updates the configuration of an already enabled control. If the enabled control shows an EnablementStatus of FAILED, you can re-run this operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Control

request.description: Resets a control to its default configuration. This operation is asynchronous and returns an operation identifier.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Control Operation

request.description: Returns the status of a particular EnableControl or DisableControl operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Control Operations

request.description: Provides a list of operations in progress or complete within the past 90 days. Optionally filter by the status of the operation, the affected target, or the type of operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Enable (apply) a Baseline to a Target. This API starts an asynchronous operation to deploy resources specified by the Baseline to the specified Target.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Disable an EnabledBaseline resource on the specified Target. This API starts an asynchronous operation to remove all resources deployed as part of the baseline enablement.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Retrieve details about an existing Baseline resource by specifying its identifier.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a summary list of all available baselines.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Baseline

request.description: Retrieve details of an EnabledBaseline resource by specifying its identifier.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Baselines

request.description: Returns a list of summaries describing EnabledBaseline resources.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Baseline

request.description: Updates an EnabledBaseline resource's applied parameters or version. This operation applies only to the managed account resources enrolled through the baseline.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Baseline

request.description: Re-enables an EnabledBaseline resource. For example, this API can re-apply the existing Baseline after a new member account is moved to the target OU.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Baseline Operation

request.description: Returns the details of an asynchronous baseline operation, as initiated by any of these APIs.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
